title: Bare Bones Golden Crowns
description: A resource pack that turns Golden Helmets into Golden Crowns, in the style of Bare Bones
body:
This is a simple resource pack that turns Golden Helmets into Golden Crowns in the style of Bare Bones. It updates the model, the item and the item name.

I'm too lazy to take more screenshots for the Bare Bones version so just look at the original version and imagine it in the Bare Bones style

[Original Version with images](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-crowns-pack/)

I made both of these at the same time but I couldn't be bothered going through the upload process twice so that's why this was uploaded later
